pandasZ

boolr
value_to_maskr
9/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/sklearn/utils/_mask.py
_get_dense_mask	
Compute the boolean mask X == value_to_mask.
    Parameters
    ----------
    X : {ndarray, sparse matrix} of shape (n_samples, n_features)
        Input data, where ``n_samples`` is the number of samples and
        ``n_features`` is the number of features.
    value_to_mask : {int, float}
        The value which is to be masked in X.
    Returns
    -------
    X_mask : {ndarray, sparse matrix} of shape (n_samples, n_features)
        Missing mask.
    Z
csr)
issparser
data
formatZ
csr_matrixZ
csc_matrix
indices
copyZ
indptrr
sparse_constructorZ	Xt_sparser
	_get_mask!
